summary: Adds StAppKey (ST-App-Key apiKey header) and TenantID fields plus ST_APP_KEY/ST_TENANT_ID env reads to Config.
reason: ServiceTitan uses composed auth (static ST-App-Key apiKey header AND OAuth2 client_credentials bearer), but the v4.6.1 generator wired only the OAuth half (#1303 apiKey half). Every Pricebook path is also tenant-scoped (/tenant/{tenant}/...), which needs a TenantID surface (#1332).
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/config/, end-to-end auth login + categories get-list against live JKA tenant
